name: feature_003_plugin_hook_registration
description: Support registering plugin post-run hooks with alias-aware lookup and status reporting.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this remains small feature work because it adds post-run hook registration plus alias-aware introspection across registry, invocation, and status reporting. The weakness addressed was a too-neat happy path; the hardened task now requires aliases, status output, and duplicate-alias safety in addition to hook execution.
mutability_notes: Extra interaction added: plugin metadata must flow into command lookup, hook invocation, and status listing. Shallow solutions that only patch execute() or only register hooks without aliases/introspection are now caught by hidden tests and the contract script.
